池朝暮收到了一份特别的快递，据说可以弥补他的遗憾。
在他百般纠结，在又一次因为身体出现问题之后，他打开了那个头盔。
他成为了一个感情骗子！虽然他没觉得有什么就是了。而且虽然他是一个骗子，但是他当时也是真喜欢他们。他也付出了真感情的！不能再怪他了哦。
然而等一切都结束之后，他的世界好像跟那个世界融合了！他从池朝暮变成了池昭沐，他的攻略对象接二连三的找到了他。
服部平次，工藤新一，白马探，黑羽快斗，萩原研二，松田阵平，诸伏景光，降谷零，赤井秀一，黑泽阵，工藤优作，还有乌丸莲耶，（诸伏高明）
哈哈，完了，他好像真的要死了！
预警：1.作者只能接受这些人在遇到主角之前有女朋友什么的（不能有老婆！！！），所以工藤新一和工藤优作没有血缘关系！但是会假结婚！（因为想给新一一个完整的家）
2.不会虐主，所以会有感官平衡系统，成年组会上桌吃饭
3.赞美橙子！！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/184f5d8b8a8500d7c565e1ebbf45cc50~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"渡鸦栖野","author_id":"","book_id":"7546918338094435352","book_name":"名柯：游戏成为现实的我该怎么办","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#502020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5503人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":4,"name":"校园","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4&name=校园&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":484,"name":"HE","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484&name=HE&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7572053277798302232","read_count":"5503","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"263447"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.8","serial_count":"189","tags":"双男主,校园,二次元,HE,同人,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/184f5d8b8a8500d7c565e1ebbf45cc50~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779301866&x-signature=38hlKceECZ2auVKQ9zjMjxu5VaU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3044965833770484","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"158"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322023106995B55DAAB98ABD8DC8F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,
